title: ceodes umbellifera var. acuminata
intro: Ceodes umbellifera var. acuminata, also known as the Toothache Plant, is a tropical plant species native to the Americas, characterized by its small white flowers and unique ability to relieve toothache pain. The plant contains compounds with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health issues, including toothaches, headaches, and arthritis. The health benefits of Ceodes umbellifera var. acuminata include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for oral health issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as a mouthwash, tincture, or poultice, which can be applied topically to alleviate pain and inflammation.
